pong.title: Multi Level Pong
pong.instructions: Pong, but make it chaos. Play solo, head to head, or go full 4 player mayhem. Choose your mode and survive. Player 1: W/S, Player 2: Up/Down, Player 3: TBD, Player 4: TBD. First to 10 wins.

ss.title: Salt Salt
ss.instructions: Pour the salt into the correct container before time runs out. Sounds easy. It is not.

gooselife.title: Goose Life
gooselife.instructions: Train your goose. Race other geese. Become the greatest goose. A Duck Life parody with absolutely no ducks.

walk.title: Walk
walk.instructions: A 3D platformer where you walk. Use WASD to move, Space to jump. Try not to fall. You will fall.

bCalc.title: Bad Calculator
bCalc.instructions: A calculator that does things when you do calculations. What things? You'll find out. Try not to break it. You will break it.

BnG.title: Water Boy and Fire Girl
BnG.instructions: Two players, two elements, one goal. Water Boy can't touch fire, Fire Girl can't touch water. Work together to reach the exit. Player 1: WASD, Player 2: Arrow Keys.
